business.name: National Epoxy Pros
business.primary_offer: Premium epoxy, polished concrete, stained concrete, concrete countertops, training, products, and nationwide installation network

control_plane.protected_mutation_rule: No GitHub, Drive, Vercel, Supabase, production, paid API, or external-message mutation without explicit current-session approval.

source_inputs.role: Auto Builder, repo, Vercel, cron, validation, and generator reference
browser validation skill and blocker-reporting standard

cron_workflows.name: nep_factory_readiness
cron_workflows.purpose: Check env readiness, source packet availability, route manifest integrity, and approval status.

cron_workflows.name: nep_source_sync
cron_workflows.purpose: Normalize source-truth docs, route maps, screenshots, and asset manifests into the build queue.

cron_workflows.name: nep_seo_observation
cron_workflows.purpose: Check sitemap, metadata, schema readiness, and search-observation tasks where approved.

cron_workflows.name: nep_validation_sweep
cron_workflows.purpose: Trigger route smoke checks, QA queue work, and browser validation handoff.

cron_workflows.name: nep_receipt_rollup
cron_workflows.purpose: Summarize receipts, blocked actions, validation status, and release readiness.

cron_workflows.name: nep_open_gap_review
cron_workflows.purpose: Produce weekly unresolved gap review for human approval and remediation planning.

acceptance_criteria: All 21 routes are represented in code or explicit route stubs.
Public pages match the black, gold, white, premium contractor design system from the collage.
Dashboard pages preserve dense dark UI structure and role-specific widgets.
Digital bid and contact forms post to local mock/API route first and do not require live Supabase for first build.
Vercel cron endpoints require CRON_SECRET authorization.
Cron handlers are idempotent and return structured JSON receipts.
Playwright desktop and mobile screenshots are captured when Chromium is available.
Release is blocked until GitHub push, Vercel config, env setup, and validation are explicitly approved.
